import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import Statscard from '../components/Statscard'; import './dashboard.css'; const Dashboard = () => { const [currentTime, setCurrentTime] = useState(new Date()); useEffect(() => { const timer = setInterval(() => setCurrentTime(new Date()), 1000); return () => clearInterval(timer); }, []); return (

Hospital Overview

Real-time metrics and patient activity

Last updated: {currentTime.toLocaleTimeString()}
{/* Top Stat Cards Section */}
{/* Main Visuals Section */}
{/* Weekly Activity Box */}

Weekly Admissions Activity

Mon
Tue
Wed
Thu
Fri
Sat
Sun
{/* Right Side Panels */}
{/* Department Distribution Box */}

Patients by Department

  • Cardiology 35%
  • Neurology 20%
  • Orthopedics 25%
  • General Care 20%
{/* Recent Activities */}

Recent Activities

  • 10:30 AM Patient John Doe admitted to Cardiology
  • 09:45 AM Dr. Smith completed surgery
  • 09:15 AM New appointment scheduled
  • 08:50 AM Medication inventory updated
  • 08:30 AM Staff shift handover completed
{/* Quick Actions */}
); }; export default Dashboard;
